meta.title: Online BCom Degree with 100% Placement Assistance
meta.description: Build a strong foundation in commerce with Teksversity’s BCom degree. Learn accounting, taxation, economics, and business law with expert mentors and placement support.

mainEntity.name: What is the B.Com course and what does it teach?

acceptedAnswer.text: The B.Com (Bachelor of Commerce) is a three-year undergraduate degree that provides a strong foundation in commerce, finance, and business management. It teaches accounting, taxation, economics, and business law, preparing students for careers in banking, auditing, and corporate finance.

mainEntity.name: What are the main subjects in a B.Com program?

acceptedAnswer.text: The B.Com syllabus covers Financial Accounting, Cost Accounting, Business Economics, Auditing, Income Tax, and Corporate Law. These subjects build analytical and managerial skills essential for business operations and professional commerce roles.

mainEntity.name: What is the scope of a B.Com degree in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: B.Com graduates have excellent scope across industries like banking, taxation, accounting, and corporate finance. They can work in public and private organizations or pursue higher studies such as MBA, M.Com, CA, CMA, or ACCA for career advancement.

mainEntity.name: Is B.Com a good course after 12th commerce?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, B.Com is one of the most popular and valuable degrees after 12th commerce. It builds a student’s understanding of financial systems, business management, and economics, offering long-term career stability and growth.

mainEntity.name: Which is the best online platform to study B.Com in India?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity is one of the best online and blended-learning platforms for B.Com studies in India, offering practical learning, expert mentorship, digital accounting tools, and 100% placement support for career success.

mainEntity.name: Why should I choose Teksversity for my B.Com degree?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity offers an industry-integrated B.Com curriculum that blends theoretical learning with practical exposure, including live projects, case studies, and career-oriented workshops designed to make students job-ready.

mainEntity.name: From which university will I receive my B.Com degree at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: The B.Com degree from Teksversity is awarded by a UGC-recognized university partner, ensuring that the qualification is valid for higher studies and employment both in India and abroad.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity provide internships or practical training during the B.Com course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students gain hands-on experience through internships, live business case studies, and financial accounting projects that enhance real-world understanding and professional readiness.

mainEntity.name: What type of placement support does Teksversity provide for B.Com students?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity provides 100% placement assistance including resume building, LinkedIn optimization, interview preparation, and recruiter networking to help students secure roles in top commerce and finance companies.

mainEntity.name: Does Teksversity offer additional certifications along with the B.Com program?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, students receive training in Tally ERP, Excel for Accounting, GST, and Digital Finance tools, adding extra value to their B.Com degree and improving their employability in competitive job markets.

heading: Overview of
Bachelor of Commerce (BCom)
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build a Career in Commerce and Financial Management
overViewOfOnline.description: Build a strong career in commerce and finance with the Bachelor of Commerce (BCom) program at Teksversity. This online BCom course equips students with core knowledge in accounting, taxation, economics, and business management. Through case studies and practical learning, learners gain the analytical and decision-making skills needed to excel in finance, banking, auditing, and entrepreneurship while preparing for advanced studies like MBA, CA, or CMA.

heading: Why Choose Bachelor of Commerce (BCom) in
Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Choosing Teksversity for your BCom course means joining a program designed to merge academic excellence with real-world financial expertise. Our curriculum bridges traditional commerce education with digital accounting tools, data analysis, and business applications.

description.firstDescription: Interactive sessions, assignments, and simulation projects ensure students apply what they learn in realistic business scenarios. Guided by expert faculty, learners gain confidence in using accounting software, interpreting reports, and presenting data insights effectively.

description.secondDescription: Beyond academics, Teksversity provides strong placement assistance, career mentorship, and skill-building sessions to prepare you for the financial job market. From resume development to interview preparation and corporate networking, we support you throughout your learning journey.

keyPoints: Real-time business simulations and financial analysis
Career counseling and financial domain guidance
Internship and corporate tie-ups with leading firms
Industry expert webinars and networking events
Webinars with finance and commerce leaders
Alumni success sessions and case presentations

heading: Download Our
Course Brochure
downloadOurCourseBrochure.description: Get complete insights into the BCom program at Teksversity your gateway to a rewarding career in commerce, finance, and accounting. Explore how our online BCom degree blends academic learning with practical skill-building.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
